annotations.comment: File-level annotation — should be reachable via Tab in diff mode even when line 1 is only context. Box should show 📄 marker.
Annotation on the new divide() function (middle of file). Tab from the file-level annotation should scroll here.
Annotation near the bottom (NEW_VERSION + formatOutput). This should be well out of the initial viewport — Tab must scroll it fully into view including the entire annotation box.
